category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU implementation of the programming language APL; official GNU page describes GNU APL as an interpreter for APL.
display_name_sources: Official GNU homepage and manual use GNU APL.
docs_sources: Official GNU manual and project page provide reference manual, quick tour, and installation documentation.
repo_sources: Official GNU APL page lists the Savannah Git checkout URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description/executables and official GNU page describe an APL interpreter, scripting support, and command-line use.
